nodes.label: Comprehensive test battery for the 11 MICA ATOM improvements.  Tests are self-
The LLM might hallucinate entity names.  The guardrail should     replace inven
Vectorised batch cosine + COMPASS scoring in the merger.
Entity embeddings should combine name (0.6) and label (0.4).
Generic labels like 'entity' or 'subject' should not be embedded.
Isolated entities (zero quintuple mentions) should be healed.
COMPASS combines cosine (0.50) + lexical Jaccard (0.30) + temporal (0.20).
Bridge entities are articulation points whose removal disconnects the graph.
A→B→C: B is a bridge entity.
A→B, B→C, C→A: no single removal disconnects the graph.
Center connected to A, B, C, D (no edges among A,B,C,D).         If center is r
Build a minimal ATOMMemorySystem with pre-loaded quintuples.
Subject and object both in the fact → high score.
Subject and object NOT in the fact → low score.
Even if all quintuples are below threshold, filter returns them all.
After exactly one half-life, confidence should be ~50% of base.
After many half-lives, confidence should be near zero.
Without thermodynamic state, base confidence is 0.7 (default).
If no reference_time passed, uses datetime.utcnow().
No provenance entry when canonical == merged_from.
Full entity resolution should produce provenance records.
Predicate synonyms are mapped to canonical forms.
End-to-end merge with entities, relations, and quintuples.
End-to-end quintuple extraction (heuristic path — no LLM).
Ensure the thermodynamic adaptation in merger still works.
`mica.memory.atom` should support lazy imports for lightweight consumers.
